# Source Catalog - agentic-workflow-patterns

This catalog tracks the authoritative external sources used to keep this skill current and reusable.

| Source | What It Provides | Why It Is Valuable | In Use | Last Evaluated | Current Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [Building effective agents (Anthropic)](https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents) | Canonical agentic patterns: prompt chaining, parallelization, orchestrator-subagent, evaluator-optimizer, and routing | The primary authoritative source for naming and defining agentic workflow composition patterns | Yes | 2026-05-06 | Current | Primary pattern source for all five workflow pattern types |
| [DORA AI Research](https://dora.dev/ai/) | AI impact on four key delivery metrics and ROI evidence for AI-assisted software delivery | Grounds agentic delivery design in measured outcome evidence; connects workflow quality to deployment frequency and change fail rate | Yes | 2026-05-06 | Current | Used to justify artifact-first and gate-based workflow discipline |

## Freshness Policy

- Default maximum age: 30 days.
- If Last Evaluated exceeds the threshold, set Current Status to Needs Review.
- If a source is no longer maintained or relevant, mark In Use as No and Current Status as Deprecated.
